name: Peanut Rocky Road
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a bowl set over hot water, stirring constantly until smooth.
2. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Gradually fold in the chopped peanuts and marshmallows until combined.
4. Spoon spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
5. Allow to chill until firm before serving.
